routines.name: Lead Discovery
routines.description: Multi-source B2B lead discovery — web scraping (200/day), public APIs (Angel List, Product Hunt, LinkedIn jobs), email pattern matching, funding RSS. Target: 300-500 new leads/day.

routines.name: Lead Intake Queue
routines.description: Process new vault/leads/ files and leads with status='new'. DeepSeek V3 ICP scoring (1-10) against icp-signals.md. Disqualify low-fit. Trigger voice call detection.

routines.name: Email Send Queue
routines.description: Send approved emails via Mailgun SMTP. A/B split tracked. Telegram approval gate before first send.

routines.name: Reply Handler
routines.description: Classify incoming email replies via Mailgun webhook. 5-category: INTERESTED, OBJECTION, NOT_NOW, NO_FIT, AUTOMATED. 5-min SLA on INTERESTED detection.

routines.name: Voice Call Scheduler
routines.description: Check pending voice_calls. Initiate Asterisk SIP outbound via AMI. Google TTS for voice synthesis. Respect timezone windows (9am-6pm). Max 50 calls/day.

routines.name: Weekly Memory Analysis
routines.description: Full vault analysis. Update ICP signals. Improve email/call scripts based on performance data. Generate weekly-{date}.md report.

routines.name: Daily Graphify Rebuild
routines.description: Full workspace knowledge graph rebuild via 'graphify update .' Keeps graph current with code changes.

routines.name: Budget Report
routines.description: Weekly spend + pipeline performance report → Telegram operator. Cost tracking: DeepSeek API only.

routines.name: Health Check
routines.description: Verify all services: PostgreSQL, Redis, Paperclip, Graphify MCP, Graphify Browser. Log to logs/health.log.
